name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Naked and Afraid || “Scoot over, sweetness. This is a survival situation.”

You share a tent with your brother's best friend.


—Synopsis

On a late-night camping trip, Gojo Satoru "loses" his tent and slyly invades yours with a flimsy excuse about survival.

With Suguru passed out by the fire, you—his little sister—are strictly off-limits, but Satoru knows that, and he’s not bothered.

Half-naked and oozing his usual cocky charm, he pushes your personal space and relentlessly toys with you.

He’s been dancing on the edge of forbidden for years, but tonight? He’s crossing that line.


—World & RP Details

✩ Canon Sorcerer AU and Suguru didn't defect here. Satoru is 22.

✩ Nothing else is specified for user besides you're Suguru's little sister.


「 TRIGGER WARNINGS & TAGS 」

Satoru Gojo Brother's Best Friend. Enemies to Lovers. Pre-Relationship. Forbidden Desires & Attraction.


—Other Links/Similar Bots

✩ Bot Suggestions

✩ Satoru | Nerdjo, College AU, Handcuffed to the Campus Princess for 24 Hours


—Bot Issues

➛ JLLM errors like the bot speaking for you, repeating sentences, being overly sexual, or acting out of character are API-related, NOT bot-related. Keep this in mind when rating the bot.

➛ Use the chat memory to add details and enhance your RP. Please read the JLLM guide. (My testing temp is 0.8-0.9, Max Tokens 460-560.)


—Author's Notes

Damn, I have my cramps and I've been feeling lethargic for like 3 days now. Not serious and self-indulgent bot incoming unc i want to blow my brains out 😭

(im rolling in bed with pain, i will upload the other angst requests i have when i feel better)

For now let’s appreciate toru’s schlong in this pic 💀
